title: Muster and move livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Muster and move livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for muster

pcs.text: Identify mustering equipment and requirements, and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify mustering equipment and requirements, and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify mustering equipment and requirements, and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm mustering method and transport requirements with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm mustering method and transport requirements with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm mustering method and transport requirements with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify and access information relevant to livestock movement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and access information relevant to livestock movement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and access information relevant to livestock movement.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment or PPE to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for muster

elements.title: Muster livestock

pcs.text: Locate and assemble livestock identified in the muster plan in preparation for movement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and assemble livestock identified in the muster plan in preparation for movement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and assemble livestock identified in the muster plan in preparation for movement.

pcs.text: Carry out muster processes according to supervisor instructions and workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out muster processes according to supervisor instructions and workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out muster processes according to supervisor instructions and workplace animal welfare practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Muster livestock

elements.title: Move livestock

pcs.text: Carry out livestock movement using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out livestock movement using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out livestock movement using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Monitor and maintain livestock welfare during movement with adequate provision of rest, water and feeding points
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and maintain livestock welfare during movement with adequate provision of rest, water and feeding points?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and maintain livestock welfare during movement with adequate provision of rest, water and feeding points.

pcs.text: Confine livestock at destination and ensure adequate provision of water and feed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confine livestock at destination and ensure adequate provision of water and feed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confine livestock at destination and ensure adequate provision of water and feed.

pcs.text: Count and record number of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Count and record number of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Count and record number of livestock.

pcs.text: Follow workplace biosecurity policies according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace biosecurity policies according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace biosecurity policies according to supervisor instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Move livestock
